command: fastxlsx_bench_streaming_writer --scenario mixed --rows 100000 --cols 10 --sheets 1 --string-pattern mixed --string-strategy inline --string-ratio 0.2 --compression-level 6 --output result.xlsx --result result.json
temporary_worksheet_part_footprint_metri: worksheet body file bytes; not process RSS or total package assembly memory
scope: single measured run on the manifest environment; not a cross-machine, comparative, or generalized performance claim
workbook_retention: generated workbook verified locally and intentionally not tracked
